title: ‘The perception is terrible’: Satya Nadella acknowledges AI fears, but says technology will lift wages
description: Amid mounting public concerns over artificial intelligence and the rapid expansion of data centres, Microsoft chief Satya Nadella acknowledged that perceptions around AI have soured. Yet, he argued the technology would ultimately raise incomes, benefit society broadly and remain a powerful force for economic growth.
content: As political resistance to artificial intelligence intensifies in the United States, Microsoft chief executive Satya Nadella has acknowledged the growing unease surrounding the technology, while maintaining that AI will ultimately generate economic b... [3502 chars]

title: AI Revolution: Replacing Degrees with Digital Prowess in Germany
description: A recent survey by the German economic research institute Ifo indicates that nearly 20% of German companies using artificial intelligence find it feasible to replace employees with university degrees with AI-enabled staff, highlighting a significant shift towards digital capabilities over traditional qualifications.
content: A groundbreaking survey conducted by the Institute for Economic Research in Germany, Ifo, has unveiled that the advent of artificial intelligence is reshaping the workforce landscape. According to the survey, nearly 20% of companies utilizing AI have... [814 chars]

title: Jeff Bezos rejects fear that AI will take humans’ jobs
description: Jeff Bezos said that young people’s pessimism about artificial intelligence is the ‘opposite of reality’
content:
Controversial Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has rejected concerns that artificial intelligence will take human jobs.

title: Exclusive: U.S. bank regulators ramp up scrutiny of AI use at financial companies
description: U.S. banking regulators are stepping up scrutiny of how lenders deploy artificial intelligence as the developing technology sweeps through the industry, pressing firms on everything from data access and governance controls ​to risks posed by third-party vendors, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Amazon Founder Jeff Bezos' Bet to Build "Artificial General Engineer"
description: Jeff Bezos' Prometheus is betting that the next wave of artificial intelligence will not come from language models, but from systems that can design and build in the physical world.
